items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Where are you from, Ethan?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L04-01 - E1041 - Noah - Where are you from, Ethan.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Is it time to go home?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L07-02 - E1072 - Ethan - Is it time to go home.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: What do you have inside?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L11-02 - E1112 - Mia - What do you have inside.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Is there a place to study?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L15-05 - E1155 - Ethan - Is there a place to study.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Here you are.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L18-06 - E1186 - Ethan - Here you are.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Does it stop near my house?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L19-05 - E1195 - Ethan - Does it stop near my house.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I take the bus home.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L20-01 - E1201 - Ethan - I take the bus home.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: I walk home.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L20-04 - E1204 - Noah - I walk home.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: I go home with my sister.
items.translation: Voy a casa con mi hermana.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L20-05 - E1205 - Emma - I go home with my sister.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Where does she work?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L22-03 - E1223 - Noah - Where does she work.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Where do they live?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L25-02 - E1252 - Ethan - Where do they live.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: They live in a small town.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L25-03 - E1253 - Noah - They live in a small town.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I live in a small house.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L26-01 - E1261 - Ethan - I live in a small house.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Where is your computer?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L27-04 - E1274 - Noah - Where is your computer.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I usually stay home.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L30-02 - E1302 - Ethan - I usually stay home.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: It is raining outside.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L34-01 - E1341 - Mia - It is raining outside.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: Let's wait inside.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L34-05 - E1345 - Mia - Let's wait inside.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Excuse me. Where is the bank?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L41-01 - E1411 - Ethan - Excuse me. Where is the bank.mp3

items.speaker: Mother
items.text: Yes. Here it is.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L42-04 - E1424 - Mother - Yes. Here it is.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Did you travel anywhere?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L01-03 - E2013 - Noah - Did you travel anywhere.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: No, I stayed in my hometown.
items.translation: No, me quedé en mi ciudad natal.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L01-04 - E2014 - Ethan - No, I stayed in my hometown.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: Class, this is Sofia. She is new here.
items.translation: Clase, ella es Sofia. Es nueva aquí.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L02-01 - E2021 - Mr. Carter - Class, this is Sofia. She is new here.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: How long have you lived here?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L02-03 - E2023 - Mia - How long have you lived here.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Do you like the city so far?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L02-05 - E2025 - Noah - Do you like the city so far.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: He was walking home when he saw a lost dog.
items.translation: Estaba caminando a casa cuando vio un perro perdido.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L06-04 - E2064 - Ethan - He was walking home when he saw a lost dog.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: How long have you lived here?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L09-03 - E2093 - Ethan - How long have you lived here.mp3

items.speaker: Sofia
items.text: I've lived here since January.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L09-04 - E2094 - Sofia - I've lived here since January.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Yes, let's sit here.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L13-06 - E2136 - Noah - Yes, let's sit here.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: Yes, I've bought several things there.
items.translation: Sí, he comprado varias cosas allí.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L18-03 - E2183 - Emma - Yes, I've bought several things there.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: If it rains, we'll move the event indoors.
items.translation: Si llueve, moveremos el evento adentro.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L27-02 - E2272 - Mr. Carter - If it rains, we'll move the event indoors.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: The audience isn't here yet.
items.translation: El público todavía no está aquí.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L29-04 - E2294 - Ethan - The audience isn't here yet.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: Yes. Sofia has won second place.
items.translation: Sí. Sofia ganó el segundo lugar.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L30-05 - E2305 - Emma - Yes. Sofia has won second place.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: Where are we staying?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L31-04 - E2314 - Emma - Where are we staying.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: The forest was much quieter than the city.
items.translation: El bosque era mucho más tranquilo que la ciudad.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L36-01 - E2361 - Mia - The forest was much quieter than the city.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: But the city is a little more convenient.
items.translation: Pero la ciudad es un poco más conveniente.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L36-02 - E2362 - Noah - But the city is a little more convenient.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: The cabin was less comfortable than my house.
items.translation: La cabaña era menos cómoda que mi casa.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L36-03 - E2363 - Emma - The cabin was less comfortable than my house.mp3

items.speaker: Manager
items.text: Why do you want to work here?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L39-01 - E2391 - Manager - Why do you want to work here.mp3

items.speaker: Customer
items.text: Could you tell me where the travel books are?
items.translation: ¿Podrías decirme dónde están los libros de viajes?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L41-01 - E2411 - Customer - Could you tell me where the travel books are.mp3

items.speaker: Manager
items.text: We can give you store credit instead.
items.translation: Podemos darle crédito de tienda en su lugar.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L42-06 - E2426 - Manager - We can give you store credit instead.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: If I were you, I'd talk to your manager.
items.translation: Si yo fuera tú, hablaría con tu gerente.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L45-04 - E2454 - Noah - If I were you, I'd talk to your manager.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: Where would you go if you could travel anywhere?
items.translation: ¿A dónde irías si pudieras viajar a cualquier lugar?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L46-01 - E2461 - Mr. Carter - Where would you go if you could travel anywhere.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: Yes, I have it here.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L05-04 - BR1054 - Leo - Yes, I have it here.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: Who left this bag here?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L06-01 - BR1061 - Ava - Who left this bag here.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: Where are you?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L09-01 - BR1091 - Ava - Where are you.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: Have you left home?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L09-03 - BR1093 - Ava - Have you left home.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: I'll be there soon.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L09-06 - BR1096 - Leo - I'll be there soon.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: Maybe. Where do you want to go?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L13-02 - BR1132 - Nora - Maybe. Where do you want to go.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: At least you're here now.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L15-05 - BR1155 - Leo - At least you're here now.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: Where did you hear that?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L22-04 - BR1224 - Ava - Where did you hear that.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: I just realized the new place is near us.
items.translation: Acabo de darme cuenta de que el nuevo lugar está cerca.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L28-06 - BR1286 - Ben - I just realized the new place is near us.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: Someone asked where we filmed the video.
items.translation: Alguien preguntó dónde grabamos el video.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L35-01 - BR1351 - Ben - Someone asked where we filmed the video.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: We'll be here to support you.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L43-06 - BR1436 - Ava - We'll be here to support you.mp3
